inputs.srepr: Add(Mul(Symbol('C_k', positive=True, real=True), Pow(Symbol('kappa', positive=True, real=True), Integer(2))), Mul(Integer(-1), Symbol('J_inside', positive=True, real=True), Symbol('kappa', positive=True, real=True)))
